description: execute_js to count unread blocked. Use the visible counter in the UI.

seed.content:
[Current page context — applies to this user message and supersedes older page context for phrases like "this page". URL: https://mail.google.com/mail/u/0/#inbox — Title: Inbox — Gmail]

how many unread emails?

expected.successRubric: Gmail shows the unread count in the tab title and in the sidebar. read_page or get_accessibility_tree reads both.
